section.title: DG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2D Class Reference

listitem.para: static TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DOMove (this Rigidbody2D target, Vector2 endValue, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens a Rigidbody2D's position to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DOMoveX (this Rigidbody2D target, float endValue, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens a Rigidbody2D's X position to the given value.
static TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DOMoveY (this Rigidbody2D target, float endValue, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens a Rigidbody2D's Y position to the given value.
static TweenerCore< float, float, FloatOptions > DORotate (this Rigidbody2D target, float endValue, float duration)
Tweens a Rigidbody2D's rotation to the given value.
static Sequence DOJump (this Rigidbody2D target, Vector2 endValue, float jumpPower, int numJumps, float duration, bool snapping=false)
Tweens a Rigidbody2D's position to the given value, while also applying a jump effect along the Y axis.

static TweenerCore< Vector3, Path, PathOptions > DOPath (this Rigidbody2D target, Vector2[] path, float duration, PathType pathType=PathType.Linear, PathMode pathMode=PathMode.Full3D, int resolution=10, Color? gizmoColor=null)
Tweens a Rigidbody2D's position through the given path waypoints, using the chosen path algorithm.

static TweenerCore< Vector3, Path, PathOptions > DOLocalPath (this Rigidbody2D target, Vector2[] path, float duration, PathType pathType=PathType.Linear, PathMode pathMode=PathMode.Full3D, int resolution=10, Color? gizmoColor=null)
Tweens a Rigidbody2D's localPosition through the given path waypoints, using the chosen path algorithm.

section.section:
Member Function Documentation
DOJump() DOJumpDG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2D DG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2DDOJump
Sequence DG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2D.DOJump (this Rigidbody2D target, Vector2 endValue, float jumpPower, int numJumps, float duration, bool snapping = false )[static]
Tweens a Rigidbody2D's position to the given value, while also applying a jump effect along the Y axis.
Returns a Sequence instead of a Tweener. Also stores the Rigidbody2D as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations.
IMPORTANT: a rigidbody2D can't be animated in a jump arc using MovePosition, so the tween will directly set the position
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
jumpPower
Power of the jump (the max height of the jump is represented by this plus the final Y offset)
numJumps
Total number of jumps
duration
The duration of the tween
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers
DOLocalPath() DOLocalPathDG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2D DG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2DDOLocalPath
TweenerCore< Vector3, Path, PathOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2D.DOLocalPath (this Rigidbody2D target, Vector2[] path, float duration, PathType pathType = PathType::Linear , PathMode pathMode = PathMode::Full3D , int resolution = 10 , Color? gizmoColor = null )[static]
Tweens a Rigidbody2D's localPosition through the given path waypoints, using the chosen path algorithm.
Also stores the Rigidbody2D as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
NOTE: to tween a Rigidbody2D correctly it should be set to kinematic at least while being tweened.
BEWARE: doesn't work on Windows Phone store (waiting for Unity to fix their own bug). If you plan to publish there you should use a regular transform.DOLocalPath.
Parameters
path
The waypoint to go through
duration
The duration of the tween
pathType
The type of path: Linear (straight path), CatmullRom (curved CatmullRom path) or CubicBezier (curved with control points)
pathMode
The path mode: 3D, side-scroller 2D, top-down 2D
resolution
The resolution of the path: higher resolutions make for more detailed curved paths but are more expensive. Defaults to 10, but a value of 5 is usually enough if you don't have dramatic long curves between waypoints
gizmoColor
The color of the path (shown when gizmos are active in the Play panel and the tween is running)
DOMove() DOMoveDG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2D DG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2DDOMove
TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2D.DOMove (this Rigidbody2D target, Vector2 endValue, float duration, bool snapping = false )[static]
Tweens a Rigidbody2D's position to the given value.
Also stores the Rigidbody2D as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers
DOMoveX() DOMoveXDG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2D DG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2DDOMoveX
TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2D.DOMoveX (this Rigidbody2D target, float endValue, float duration, bool snapping = false )[static]
Tweens a Rigidbody2D's X position to the given value.
Also stores the Rigidbody2D as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers
DOMoveY() DOMoveYDG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2D DG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2DDOMoveY
TweenerCore< Vector2, Vector2, VectorOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2D.DOMoveY (this Rigidbody2D target, float endValue, float duration, bool snapping = false )[static]
Tweens a Rigidbody2D's Y position to the given value.
Also stores the Rigidbody2D as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
snapping
If TRUE the tween will smoothly snap all values to integers
DOPath() DOPathDG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2D DG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2DDOPath
TweenerCore< Vector3, Path, PathOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2D.DOPath (this Rigidbody2D target, Vector2[] path, float duration, PathType pathType = PathType::Linear , PathMode pathMode = PathMode::Full3D , int resolution = 10 , Color? gizmoColor = null )[static]
Tweens a Rigidbody2D's position through the given path waypoints, using the chosen path algorithm.
Also stores the Rigidbody2D as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations.
NOTE: to tween a Rigidbody2D correctly it should be set to kinematic at least while being tweened.
BEWARE: doesn't work on Windows Phone store (waiting for Unity to fix their own bug). If you plan to publish there you should use a regular transform.DOPath.
Parameters
path
The waypoints to go through
duration
The duration of the tween
pathType
The type of path: Linear (straight path), CatmullRom (curved CatmullRom path) or CubicBezier (curved with control points)
pathMode
The path mode: 3D, side-scroller 2D, top-down 2D
resolution
The resolution of the path (useless in case of Linear paths): higher resolutions make for more detailed curved paths but are more expensive. Defaults to 10, but a value of 5 is usually enough if you don't have dramatic long curves between waypoints
gizmoColor
The color of the path (shown when gizmos are active in the Play panel and the tween is running)
DORotate() DORotateDG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2D DG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2DDORotate
TweenerCore< float, float, FloatOptions > DG.Tweening.DOTweenModulePhysics2D.DORotate (this Rigidbody2D target, float endValue, float duration)[static]
Tweens a Rigidbody2D's rotation to the given value.
Also stores the Rigidbody2D as the tween's target so it can be used for filtered operations
Parameters
endValue
The end value to reach
duration
The duration of the tween
